## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (patch version)
- [ ] New feature (minor version)
- [ ] Breaking change (major version)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD change
- [ ] Security fix

## Changeset

- [ ] I have run `npx changeset` and committed the changeset file
- [ ] OR this PR does not need a version bump (docs/CI only)

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Coverage not decreased

## Security checklist (core / next changes)

- [ ] API key is not logged or included in error messages
- [ ] New inputs are validated via sanitizer
- [ ] No new external URLs added to fetch (check SSRF allowlist)
- [ ] Rate limiting still applies to new endpoints
